Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Atty. Bill J. Symes appeared for plaintiff United Commercial Bank.
Emily Ong, was placed under oath and examined on behalf of the plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Vallco International Shopping Center LLC (Vallco).
Default was entered against defendant on September 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff United Commercial Bank against the Defaulted Defendant Valco International Shopping Center, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company as follows:
Damages/Principal - $16,353,831.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $ 766,586.70.
Attorney's Fees - $ 433,385.75
for a total judgment in the amount of $ 16,353,831.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
